title: AI Powered Smart Interview
description: An AI-based smart interview platform that creates mock interviews based on user resumes. It extracts projects and skills from the resume, then starts an intelligent interview tailored to the candidate's profile.

title: Movieify Website
description: A highly animated movie web page often use immersive storytelling to mimic the feel of cinema through the browser.

description: An AI-based Exam notes websites that will create a notes based on user requirement with Chart, Diagram.....

title: Video Confrencing Website
description: A dynamic video conferencing solution designed for high-definition virtual meetings and real-time collaboration. It features seamless screen sharing, interactive chat, and scalable infrastructure for reliable remote communication.

title: SmartStay Website
description: A comprehensive hospitality marketplace connecting travelers with unique accommodations and local hosts worldwide. It features a robust booking engine with integrated search filters and secure payment processing.

title: Stock Exchange Platform
description: A high-performance trading platform featuring real-time market data and seamless order execution. It offers an intuitive dashboard with advanced charting tools for a streamlined investing experience.

description: A sophisticated language proficiency assessment platform designed to evaluate and certify global English communication skills. It provides an automated testing environment with modules for reading, writing, listening, and speaking analytics.

title: Coffee Store

title: Task Manager
